continuous-learning.desc: Extract reusable insights from Socratic debates and discoveries. Capture patterns

triad-composition.desc: Select a deterministic Lead + Support + Guardian triad from the PRISTINO composition matrix using domain classification, confidence thresholds, stable tie-breakers, execution-mode routing, degraded-mode policy, and Guardian validation. Use when the user or orchestrator asks for triad composition, agent role selection, Lead/Support/Guardian routing, Pristino orchestration, domain-to-agent mapping, committee escalation, or quality-gated multiagent execution planning.
